prompt: A modern kitchen interior with warm natural light. A white-and-grey marble or granite countertop stretches across the foreground. Light wood cabinets with simple hardware hang above. A stainless steel faucet and sink area sits to the left near a large window framed in black that looks out onto greenery. White subway tile backsplash. A white coffee cup and other kitchen items are visible on the counter. Beyond the countertop, a black gas range with black iron grates and a stainless steel range hood are mounted against the far wall. A wooden knife block and a glass olive oil bottle sit along the back counter. Two small potted plants sit on the windowsill. Behind the viewer's starting position, a kitchen island with bar stools and a fruit bowl occupies the center of the room. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, standing in the kitchen and facing the countertop with the red enamel teapot prominently centered.

tracking_object.desc: red enamel teapot on the marble countertop
